description: Create or refresh a MassBattle unit from a purchased skeletal mesh using the existing MassBattle editor conversion pipeline.

input_schema.template_unit: Existing UMassBattleAgentConfigDataAsset used as the base unit.
input_schema.asset_slug: Stable unit slug used for generated asset names.
input_schema.family: Optional organization family from the style profile.
input_schema.parent_material: Optional parent material for generated material instances.
input_schema.material_overrides: Optional array of material paths or {slot_index, slot_name, slot_name_contains, material} objects applied to the generated StaticMesh after material instance generation.
input_schema.source_renderer_class: Renderer Blueprint generated class used as the template when duplicating a renderer.
input_schema.niagara_system: Optional Niagara system assigned to the renderer defaults.
input_schema.unit_patch: Union-merge patch applied to the cloned or target unit DataAsset.
input_schema.output_root: Optional override for generated content root.

pipeline.description: Resolve output folders and naming from the selected unit management style.
Find source textures from the purchased skeletal mesh material slots.
Find animation sequences that share the mesh skeleton.
Convert the skeletal mesh to MassBattle static mesh LODs.
Create material instances for generated static mesh LODs.
Override generated StaticMesh material slots with explicit materials when a skin package should replace the source mesh materials.
Convert found animation sequences into FAnimsData for AnimShared.
Union-merge generated Visualize, LODShared, AnimShared, and balance defaults into the target unit.
